'''âf-zh-f''' ('''kafazhaf''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:curlicue|curlicue]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| f-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:curlicue|curlicue]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âf-zh-f
|-
! Lemma
| kafazhaf
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thifazhaf|thifazhaf]] || [[word:jifazhaf|jifazhaf]] || [[word:shifazhaf|shifazhaf]] || [[word:kifazhaf|kifazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthufazhaf|thuthufazhaf]] || [[word:jujufazhaf|jujufazhaf]] || [[word:shushufazhaf|shushufazhaf]] || [[word:kukufazhaf|kukufazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thufazhaf|thufazhaf]] || [[word:jufazhaf|jufazhaf]] || [[word:shufazhaf|shufazhaf]] || [[word:kufazhaf|kufazhaf]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thufazhaf|thufazhaf]] || [[word:jufazhaf|jufazhaf]] || [[word:shufazhaf|shufazhaf]] || [[word:kufazhaf|kufazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thefazhaf|thefazhaf]] || [[word:jefazhaf|jefazhaf]] || [[word:shefazhaf|shefazhaf]] || [[word:kefazhaf|kefazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothofazhaf|thothofazhaf]] || [[word:jojofazhaf|jojofazhaf]] || [[word:shoshofazhaf|shoshofazhaf]] || [[word:kokofazhaf|kokofazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thofazhaf|thofazhaf]] || [[word:jofazhaf|jofazhaf]] || [[word:shofazhaf|shofazhaf]] || [[word:kofazhaf|kofazhaf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thofazhaf|thofazhaf]] || [[word:jofazhaf|jofazhaf]] || [[word:shofazhaf|shofazhaf]] || [[word:kofazhaf|kofazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠfazhaf|thĂŠfazhaf]] || [[word:jĂŠfazhaf|jĂŠfazhaf]] || [[word:shĂŠfazhaf|shĂŠfazhaf]] || [[word:kĂŠfazhaf|kĂŠfazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathafazhaf|thathafazhaf]] || [[word:jajafazhaf|jajafazhaf]] || [[word:shashafazhaf|shashafazhaf]] || [[word:kakafazhaf|kakafazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thafazhaf|thafazhaf]] || [[word:jafazhaf|jafazhaf]] || [[word:shafazhaf|shafazhaf]] || [[word:kafazhaf|kafazhaf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thafazhaf|thafazhaf]] || [[word:jafazhaf|jafazhaf]] || [[word:shafazhaf|shafazhaf]] || [[word:kafazhaf|kafazhaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shafazhaf|shafazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshafazhaf|goshafazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishafazhaf|gokishafazhaf]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shafazhafnĂŒ|shafazhafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhafnknĂŒ|goshafazhafnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhafnĂŒ|gokishafazhafnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shafazhafshĂ«|shafazhafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkshĂ«|goshafazhafnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishafazhafshĂ«|gokishafazhafshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhafro|shafazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkro|goshafazhafnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhafro|gokishafazhafro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhafmu|shafazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkmu|goshafazhafnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhafmu|gokishafazhafmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shafazhafsher|shafazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshafazhafnksher|goshafazhafnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishafazhafsher|gokishafazhafsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shafazhafng|shafazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkng|goshafazhafnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishafazhafng|gokishafazhafng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shafazhafya|shafazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkya|goshafazhafnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishafazhafya|gokishafazhafya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shafazhafyam|shafazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkyam|goshafazhafnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishafazhafyam|gokishafazhafyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazhafnĂŒshĂ«|shafazhafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazhafnknĂŒshĂ«|goshafazhafnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazhafnĂŒshĂ«|gokishafazhafnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhafnĂŒro|shafazhafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhafnknĂŒro|goshafazhafnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhafnĂŒro|gokishafazhafnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhafnĂŒmu|shafazhafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhafnknĂŒmu|goshafazhafnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhafnĂŒmu|gokishafazhafnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazhafshĂ«nĂŒ|shafazhafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshafazhafnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhafshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishafazhafshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhafshĂ«ro|shafazhafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkshĂ«ro|goshafazhafnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhafshĂ«ro|gokishafazhafshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhafshĂ«mu|shafazhafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkshĂ«mu|goshafazhafnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhafshĂ«mu|gokishafazhafshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazhafronĂŒ|shafazhafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkronĂŒ|goshafazhafnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhafronĂŒ|gokishafazhafronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazhafroshĂ«|shafazhafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkroshĂ«|goshafazhafnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazhafroshĂ«|gokishafazhafroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shafazhafromu|shafazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkromu|goshafazhafnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishafazhafromu|gokishafazhafromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shafazhafmunĂŒ|shafazhafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkmunĂŒ|goshafazhafnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishafazhafmunĂŒ|gokishafazhafmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shafazhafmushĂ«|shafazhafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkmushĂ«|goshafazhafnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishafazhafmushĂ«|gokishafazhafmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shafazhafmuro|shafazhafmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshafazhafnkmuro|goshafazhafnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishafazhafmuro|gokishafazhafmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|2edd495}}
